Demand estimation first stage

Katsuhiro Komatsu

2022-04-02

Residual price variation

  • Regress log of wage and fee on covariates and fixed effects, and then take residuals.
  • The residuals are demeaned.

Correlation between residual wages and fees

  • Regress log of wage and fee on covariates and fixed effects, and then take residuals.
  • The residuals are demeaned.
